content.text: The issue is clear: line 7 fetches `/manifest.webmanifest` directly, which returns 404 in dev mode. The fix is to check for the `<link rel="manifest">` tag in the HTML instead, then fetch the manifest from whatever URL it points to (vite-plugin-pwa serves it at a different path in dev mode).

input.command:
git add client/e2e/pwa.spec.ts && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Fix PWA e2e test: fetch manifest from link tag href

vite-plugin-pwa serves the manifest through a virtual module in dev
mode, not at /manifest.webmanifest. Instead of hardcoding the path,
find the <link rel="manifest"> tag and fetch from its href attribute.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

content.text:
Pushed to the PR branch. Here's what I changed:

**`client/e2e/pwa.spec.ts`** — Instead of fetching `/manifest.webmanifest` directly (which 404s in dev mode because vite-plugin-pwa uses a virtual module), the test now:

1. Finds the `<link rel="manifest">` tag in the page
2. Asserts it exists
3. Reads the `href` attribute from it
4. Fetches the manifest from that URL
5. Validates `manifest.name === "Balance"`

This works in both dev mode (where vite-plugin-pwa injects its own virtual path) and production builds (where the file exists at `/manifest.webmanifest`).

The other two test files (`app-loads.spec.ts`, `metric-recording.spec.ts`) don't fetch static files directly so they need no changes.

result:
Pushed to the PR branch. Here's what I changed:

**`client/e2e/pwa.spec.ts`** — Instead of fetching `/manifest.webmanifest` directly (which 404s in dev mode because vite-plugin-pwa uses a virtual module), the test now:

1. Finds the `<link rel="manifest">` tag in the page
2. Asserts it exists
3. Reads the `href` attribute from it
4. Fetches the manifest from that URL
5. Validates `manifest.name === "Balance"`

This works in both dev mode (where vite-plugin-pwa injects its own virtual path) and production builds (where the file exists at `/manifest.webmanifest`).

The other two test files (`app-loads.spec.ts`, `metric-recording.spec.ts`) don't fetch static files directly so they need no changes.
